arts.ttl: Luis Díaz one of eight Liverpool players whose contracts will be up for review in 2025
arts.sum: His contract ends in June 2027, but in England, it is customary to start the conversations and make the first proposals two years before a deal expires. The 27-year-old played the full 90 minutes in both of Colombia’s 2026 CONMEBOL World Cup qualifiers - both games ending in defeat for La Tri .
